title: Add CheckoutFlow boundary documentation
author: Maya Rao
description: Adds service boundary documentation for cart validation, order creation, inventory reservation, and delivery scheduling.

title: Extract cart validation component
author: Ethan Brooks
description: Moves cart validation out of the checkout monolith while preserving existing checkout behavior.

title: Create order creation service
author: Ethan Brooks
description: Adds order creation service that runs after inventory reservation and payment confirmation.

title: Add checkout latency dashboard
author: Lucas Chen
description: Adds dashboards for checkout latency, database saturation, and order event lag.

title: Publish order placed event
author: Ethan Brooks
description: Emits order placed events with order ID, timestamp, customer-safe status, and correlation ID.

title: Publish inventory reserved event
author: Priya Shah
description: Publishes inventory reserved and reservation released events for checkout and inventory pipelines.

title: Implement StockSync reservation rules
author: Priya Shah
description: Adds reservation and release rules for low-stock grocery items during checkout.

title: Add DeliveryTrack status labels
author: Amara Okafor
description: Adds customer-friendly delivery status labels and product copy.

title: Map order events to delivery timeline
author: Ethan Brooks
description: Maps order lifecycle events into the DeliveryTrack customer timeline.

title: Add notification idempotency keys
author: Ethan Brooks
description: Adds stable idempotency keys to delivery notification events so retries are ignored safely.

title: Deduplicate mobile push notifications
author: Amara Okafor
description: Prevents duplicate delivery notification events from creating repeated mobile push messages.

title: Add inventory freshness timestamps
author: Priya Shah
description: Adds last-updated timestamps to store inventory feeds used by search and checkout.

title: Add support context privacy rules
author: Sofia Martinez
description: Adds privacy rules limiting support visibility into customer address and driver-location details.

title: Add order event schema checklist
author: Maya Rao
description: Adds schema governance checklist for order events, idempotency, compatibility, and privacy review.

title: Add FreshCart memory graph model
author: Maya Rao
description: Defines EchoMind graph nodes and relationships for the FreshCart demo.

title: Add guided onboarding memory
author: Amara Okafor
description: Adds plain-English FreshCart story, project summaries, people profiles, and glossary terms.
